Comparison

OneBuddy vs Momentum — Productivity Extensions Compared

Momentum replaces your new tab page with an inspirational dashboard featuring weather, to-dos, and focus quotes. OneBuddy takes a side-panel approach with 15+ actual productivity tools — Pomodoro timer, clipboard manager, notes, health reminders, and more.

Feature-by-Feature Comparison

FeatureOneBuddyMomentum
Custom New Tab Page
Inspirational Quotes
Weather Widget
Pomodoro Timer
Health Reminders
Clipboard Manager
Notes & Shortcuts
Ad Blocking
Screen Recording
Privacy Blur
Browser Lock
Google Calendar
Free (Full Features)

Strengths of Each

OneBuddy Strengths

15+ functional productivity tools vs aesthetic dashboard
Ad blocking, privacy blur, and screen recording included
Health reminders for physical wellness during work
All features free — Momentum locks features behind premium
Side panel doesn't replace your new tab page

Momentum Strengths

Beautiful, inspiring new tab page design
Weather and daily photo backgrounds
Focus quotes for daily motivation
Clean, minimalist aesthetic

The Verdict

Choose Momentum if you value a beautiful new tab dashboard with daily inspiration. Choose OneBuddy if you want actual productivity tools that help you work more efficiently.

Frequently Asked Questions

Does OneBuddy replace the new tab page?
No. OneBuddy works from the side panel, leaving your new tab page unchanged. Momentum replaces your new tab page entirely.
Is Momentum free?
Momentum has a free tier but locks many features (integrations, fonts, custom photos) behind a paid plan. OneBuddy is completely free.
Which has more productivity features?
OneBuddy includes 15+ functional tools (Pomodoro, clipboard, notes, recording, privacy). Momentum focuses on aesthetic and motivational features.

Try OneBuddy Free

Get everything Momentum offers and more — completely free, no account required.
